name: Detection of Turla Directory and Filename IOC in Events
notes:
This rule triggers when an IOC is recognized as a Turla directory and filename combination.

Note: The rules Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events, Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events have been excluded from this rule to avoid repetition, their purpose is to have a dedicated rule response.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when an event matches any of the following Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events, Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events

when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful File Modification, System.File Deleted, System.File Created, Audit.Object Load Success, System.Process Creation Success, System.Information, Access.Permission Change Success, Audit.Object Access Success, Audit.Object Access Failure

when the event matches (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('.*?\/(tmp)') and (LOWER("Filename") MATCHES ('(\\\.ur-|\.gdm-socket|\.gdm-selinux)') ) ) OR (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\/library\/scripts).*') and (LOWER("Filename") MATCHES('(\.sh|queue|installdp|installd\.sh)') ) ) OR (LOWER("Filename") MATCHES('(\.bin)') and (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(appdata\\+local\\+kb6867)') OR LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(appdata\\+roaming\\+kb6867)') ) ) OR (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(/library/launchdaemons)') and LOWER("Filename") MATCHES('(com.adobe.update.plist)') ) OR (LOWER("Filename") MATCHES ('(\.dat)') and (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+users\\+public\\+icore)') OR LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+public\\+icore)') ) ) OR (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+msctx)') and LOWER("Filename") MATCHES('(\.ps1)') ) OR (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+users\\+public\\+documents\\+desktop)') and LOWER("Filename") MATCHES('(\.db)') ) OR (LOWER("Filename") MATCHES ('(\.exe)') and (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+temp\\+adobe)') OR LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+temp\\+winhost)') OR LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+dbgsview)') OR LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+debugview)') OR LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+adflctlmon)') OR LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+psextendprivacy)') ) ) OR (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('.*?(\\+appdata\\+local\\+adobe)') and LOWER("Filename") MATCHES('(adobeupdater\.exe)') ) OR (LOWER("Filename") MATCHES ('(dwmapi\.dll)') and (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('.*?(\\+microsoft\\onedrive)') OR LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('.*?(google.*?chrome\application)') ) ) OR (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('.*?(\\+mozilla firefox)') and LOWER("Filename") MATCHES('(rasadhlp\.dll)') ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Detection of Turla Directory and Filename IOC in Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events, Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful File Modification, System.File Deleted, System.File Created, Audit.Object Load Success, System.Process Creation Success, System.Information, Access.Permission Change Success, Audit.Object Access Success, Audit.Object Access Failure

AND when the event matches (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('.*?\/(tmp)') and   (LOWER("Filename") MATCHES ('(\\\.ur-|\.gdm-socket|\.gdm-selinux)') ) )  OR (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\/library\/scripts).*') and    (LOWER("Filename") MATCHES('(\.sh|queue|installdp|installd\.sh)') ) ) OR (LOWER("Filename") MATCHES('(\.bin)') and   (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(appdata\\+local\\+kb6867)')      OR LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(appdata\\+roaming\\+kb6867)')   ) ) OR (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(/library/launchdaemons)') and     LOWER("Filename") MATCHES('(com.adobe.update.plist)') ) OR (LOWER("Filename") MATCHES ('(\.dat)') and     (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+users\\+public\\+icore)') OR      LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+public\\+icore)')     ) ) OR (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+msctx)') and     LOWER("Filename") MATCHES('(\.ps1)') ) OR (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+users\\+public\\+documents\\+desktop)') and     LOWER("Filename") MATCHES('(\.db)') ) OR (LOWER("Filename") MATCHES ('(\.exe)') and     (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+temp\\+adobe)') OR      LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+temp\\+winhost)') OR      LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+dbgsview)') OR      LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+debugview)') OR      LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+adflctlmon)') OR       LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('(\\+psextendprivacy)')    ) ) OR (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('.*?(\\+appdata\\+local\\+adobe)') and     LOWER("Filename") MATCHES('(adobeupdater\.exe)') ) OR (LOWER("Filename") MATCHES ('(dwmapi\.dll)') and     (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('.*?(\\+microsoft\\onedrive)') OR      LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('.*?(google.*?chrome\application)')     ) ) OR (LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('.*?(\\+mozilla firefox)') and     LOWER("Filename") MATCHES('(rasadhlp\.dll)') ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Detection of Turla Directory and Filename IOC in Events
Event description: Detects when an IOC is recognized as a Turla directory and filename combination.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
